top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EUR_to_CZK_ratio
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EUR_to_CZK_Ratio
FROM customers c;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EUR_to_CZK_ratio
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'EUR') AS REAL) / 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'CZK') AS EUR_to_CZK_ratio

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 END) AS EUR_to_CZK_Ratio
FROM customers c;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EUR_to_CZK_ratio
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'EUR') AS REAL) / 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'CZK') AS EUR_to_CZK_ratio

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 END) AS EUR_to_CZK_Ratio
FROM customers c;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EUR_to_CZK_ratio
FROM customers;
